$comment: SSOT TEMPLATE for the ssot-fanout pattern. Copy, rename to <thing>.master.json, and replace the example domain (a 'notify' fan-out to two dialects) with yours. This is the ONLY hand-edited artifact; sync.py regenerates everything else. See ssot-fanout/references/engine-design.md.

catalog.$comment: Canonical model, keyed by stable id. Each entry has a `role` (the cross-target normalization unit that drives divergence detection) plus whatever your domain needs.

message.sent.description: Example canonical entry. Replace `channel`/`kind` with your domain fields.

targets.$comment: Per downstream target. `dialect` selects the renderer in sync.py. `config_target`/`map_target` are repo-relative outputs (null = none). `runner` is a command template; {service_dir} resolves to the abs path of the engine's dir.

tailer.$comment: An inert target: no config to generate (like agent-hooks' openclaw watcher). Bindings document intended coverage only; sync skips generation for dialect 'watcher'.
